sections.paragraph:
Original: זהר

Transliteration: zâhar

Phonetic: zaw-har'

BDB Definition:

  1. to admonish, warn, teach, shine, send out light, be light, be shining
    1. (Niphal) to be taught, be admonished
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to teach, warn
      2. to shine, send out light (figuratively)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 531,532

Part(s) of speech: Verb
